goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack for BPK-073 runtime patch operator dry-runs, bundling dry-run refs and simulated steps while keeping execution, patch application, server mutation, route mount, orchestrator, providers, DB, GitHub, writes, packages, workflows, and deployment out of scope.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mount routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, change packages, or enable execution.
claims: Runtime operator dry-run evidence can be bundled without applying the patch.
Ready BPK-073 dry-run and evidence refs are required.
Execution and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual runtime patch application requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked dry-run cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mount, execution, orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, write, deployment, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-073 simulated runtime server patch application without applying patches.
